badge.useWhen: Use for small status chips or labels with semantic variants.
badge.avoidWhen: Do not use for long narrative text or raw Radix palette names.

breadcrumb.avoidWhen: Do not use for tag lists, filters, or marketing metadata.

button.useWhen: Use for CTAs and clickable actions, including hero CTAs.
button.avoidWhen: Do not handwrite button styling in pages or sections.

card.useWhen: Use for marketing, resources, product story, proof, structured data, and form shells.
card.avoidWhen: Do not use where a plain section or control is enough.

checkbox.useWhen: Use for optional boolean choices or governed checkbox UI after form semantics are proven for the target flow.
checkbox.avoidWhen: Do not use for cookie consent or other no-JS critical consent flows until migration proof exists.

dropdown-menu.useWhen: Use for keyboard-accessible menus such as language or action menus.

dialog.useWhen: Use for modal decisions, confirmations, and focused blocking interactions.
dialog.avoidWhen: Do not use for drawer-style navigation, non-modal panels, or ordinary page layout.

input.useWhen: Use for text, email, search, number, tel, and URL fields.
input.avoidWhen: Do not use for file or hidden inputs that must stay native.

label.avoidWhen: Do not handwrite label behavior in form components.

lazy-island-error-boundary.useWhen: Use to isolate lazy client island failures.
lazy-island-error-boundary.avoidWhen: Do not use for ordinary route-level error handling.

lazy-theme-switcher.useWhen: Use when the theme switcher should load as a lazy client island.
lazy-theme-switcher.avoidWhen: Do not add a second theme switcher path.

popover.useWhen: Use for small non-modal panels opened from a trigger for extra context or compact actions.
popover.avoidWhen: Do not use for modal decisions, drawer navigation, hover-only menus, or large layout panels.

radio-group.useWhen: Use for mutually exclusive visible choices where all options should be scanned before selection.
radio-group.avoidWhen: Do not use for dropdown selection, multi-select, checkbox consent, or primary navigation.

section-head.useWhen: Use for reusable section title, subtitle, and optional action layout.
section-head.avoidWhen: Do not use as a data card or form control.

select.useWhen: Use for single-choice form selection where native select styling or keyboard behavior needs a governed wrapper.
select.avoidWhen: Do not use for multi-select, checkbox groups, radio choices, or primary navigation.

separator.useWhen: Use for visual separation that needs a shared wrapper.
separator.avoidWhen: Do not use as a substitute for page grid or spacing design.

sheet.useWhen: Use for drawer-style interactions such as mobile navigation.
sheet.avoidWhen: Do not use for ordinary layout panels or Dialog semantics.

social-icons.useWhen: Use for social icon rendering and linked social destinations.
social-icons.avoidWhen: Do not duplicate icon/link mapping in pages.

status-callout.useWhen: Use for info, success, warning, error, unavailable, or form status messages.
status-callout.avoidWhen: Do not build ad hoc alert panels in business components.

tabs.useWhen: Use for keyboard-accessible content panels with a small set of related sections.
tabs.avoidWhen: Do not use for primary navigation, FAQ disclosure, or mobile drawer menus.

textarea.avoidWhen: Do not handwrite textarea styles in business components.

theme-switcher.useWhen: Use as the single shared theme switching control.
theme-switcher.avoidWhen: Do not create a second theme switching implementation.

theme-switcher-highlight.useWhen: Use only inside the theme switcher visual track.
theme-switcher-highlight.avoidWhen: Do not use as a general highlight or badge.

tooltip.useWhen: Use for brief supplemental hints on interactive controls or compact labels.
tooltip.avoidWhen: Do not use for required content, validation errors, or long explanations.
